answers.overview: A marketplace where creators publish launch-ready NOVA app templates with guided clone setup.
answers.audience: Builders, agencies, and business operators who need complete app infrastructure without starting from scratch.
answers.brand: Professional, precise, enterprise-ready, with NOVA visual identity and creator trust signals.
answers.content: Template descriptions, creator profiles, setup instructions, proof badges, screenshots, and pricing notes.
answers.features: Portfolio dashboard, marketplace listings, clone flow, creator profiles, pricing advisor, post-clone onboarding.
answers.data: Projects, templates, creators, clone events, pricing inputs, proof receipts, onboarding state.
answers.workflow: User browses templates, clones one, completes six onboarding steps, reviews price, then goes live.
answers.admin: Admins review templates, verify claims, manage featured listings, and monitor launch readiness.
answers.launch: Launch with three verified templates, creator profiles, pricing advisor, and support loop.
answers.proof: Every template needs screenshots, setup checklist, known limits, and proof receipt before publishing.
